reviews.review_description:
Wow!!!  I was surprised and really impressed with this one .... 
Its one of my favorite Mixed Reality games right now... 

 Great use of M.R. in action , with awesome gameplay too.... 👌 

This one is highly recommended... 
 for your m.r. game collection...

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun even in smaller room
reviews.review_description: I wasn't sure if it will be a game for me but I was really surprised how good it looks. Tanks look and move very realistic with all explosions and sound effects. Tutorial explains what to do. My son had lots of fun as well.

We need Chinese! There are tens of thousands of Quest users in China, and a considerable number of them cannot understand English. For us, whether a game supports Chinese is often the first thing to consider. Some developers in China have localized the game, but I still hope that the official can add Chinese support. This is a good game worth playing
This is a really cool use of MR!! Easy controls. Loved it! Will love to follow the progress of this one. Good job devs!!! Thanks for a great game!

This is great for those that love MR games.  The controls were, for me, hard to master, but when I did it was great. The visuals are crisp and clear, and the gameplay strikes a great balance between strategy, skill, and fast-paced run and hide whilst staying fun as I kept trying to avoid the table and Christmas tree.....

Each match feels rewarding, with plenty of challenge to keep you coming back for “just one more go.” Whether you’re dodging incoming fire or lining up the perfect shot.  It’s easy to pick up, but there’s enough depth to keep you engaged and looking for that next reward.

If you love playing in mixed reality then this needs to be in your collection.
Tanks in your lounge is what this is all about, controls take a little time to master, but once this is done, you are like a General commanding of his fleet of tanks, the shooting is very responsive and you really feel the explosions.
A great one to show of mixed reality to friends and family.
This game feels like you have real remote control tanks blasring around your living room! I love how it scans you room and automatically finds your surfaces! Its like magic!

reviews.review_title: War Robots Vr / Iron Rebellion in mixed
reviews.review_description: Amazing amazing amazing. I can change the room scale, the colors, more mech types or special weapon elements and abilities would be cool. Only level 10 so that make come later in campaign. Haven’t seen it yet but make a feature for local play atleast please.
Full FUN !!!! I would like Hungarian subtitles please 🙏please

reviews.review_title: I feel like a Warrior Giant
reviews.review_description: Thanks to Meta Quest Promotions Giveaways and Promotions for allowing me the opportunity to try this little gem out. I feel like a Warrior Giant playing this. I am the ruler of everyone and everything. Great Graphics and visuals. You will NOT be disappointed. Give it a try. You'll love it
Had lots of fun playing! The mechanics are cool and the controls are intuitive.

Whilst I found this an easy game to play,   it still offers a solid challenge as difficulty ramps up, encouraging replayability and score chasing, a great game game for filling in a bit of time, If you enjoy classic tank games with a modern twist, Holotanks is well worth checking out.

Love that they released it in beta. I had the idea for a game almost exactly like this and started building it, working with a studio to try to make it real. While I left it on the back burner I am excited to see someone deliver such an awesome package of this game. It has the potential to be really great if only they can fix all the bugs from the beta version. It's limiting my ability to get hooked on it since the campaign or multiplayer hasn't worked flawlessly for me. Had issues with the floor being higher than what was defined in my room scan. Then the ai robots will just kind of act dumb and stop playing. Sometimes the thing kind of locks up and I have to close the game or reboot my headset. It's rough, which is what we'd expect. So I'm excited to see this thing get past beta!

This is what I consider an essential Mixed Reality game that everyone should own if they have a Quest 3, absolutely beautifully crafted game, endless fun.
The level creator is surprisingly extensive, the tanks operate flawlessly with 3 aiming modes available that should suit different skill levels.

The co-location co-op works beautifully and instantly turned me and my partner (both in our 30's) into giggling children again working together to take out bots. It's like playing with living toys from childhood.
Severely overlooked and deserves alot of praise. I hope this game continues to grow and get the recognition it deserves.
There's alot of potential to expand too. I'd love to see a possible addition of  controllable aerial vehicles like bomber drones/helicopters.
Easy 5 stars and probably one of the best VR games available. Fantastic.
A friend bought this game but it's unplayable because it's in the ground.  All I can see is the top of the board and it has 3 choices to play but all three are stuck in my ground .

developer_response.body: Did you set up room properly? its is require  room set up to play

reviews.review_description: I don't normally write reviews, but this deserves one. For this to be just a beta, I am truly impressed. This is exactly what MR needed.  Found this through the feed. I can't wait to see the finished version. We'll done. Easy 5*

I’ve played a total of maybe 10 minutes and I’ve had the game 3 days and not able to play again. All that comes up is a choice of campaign and 2 other options. Doesn’t matter what I choose. It does absolutely nothing. Goes nowhere. Devs, respond already!!! I’ve left a review for days now and keeping it updated, but I decided to delete it just say this overall experience in a shortened fashion. I’ve uninstalled and reinstalled 2837492x and does nothing. Fix this!! I understand it’s a beta, but it’s a 4.2 because everyone is apparently able to play it and rate it. I can’t, fix this please!!! I will change the review when someone does something. I’ve reached out another way too and nobody has responded. This rating dropped it .2 stars and I don’t want to do that.

developer_response.body: New firmware released - it fixes room sync issue we are faced with deprecated API. Can you please try again?

reviews.review_description: Very fun, just as someone who uses game optimizer to push the limits of the quest 3 expected higher resolution and better performance , although in beta it's a great MR game compared to most that get boring after one play , def looking forward to the full game , also haven't actually came across the multi-player as in the trailer

developer_response.body: Remote multiplayer and colocated fix coming with in a week!

reviews.review_description:
How do you start the campaign? No instructions in tutorial. 
I click on first mission and nothing happens. I can pick up my tank but thats it. Wrist controller is awkward have to bend my arm and neck to see screen. 
 Did get tutorial to work but turret control is ridiculous. Is there a way to slow it down for fine control. 

Game has a lot of potential but so far for me unplayable. 

Happy to upgrade my rating if I can get it to work.

Update
When I start the first campaign mission the obstacles are placed and the tank is placed on the floor. But the only thing I can do is lift the tank up or down or place it somewhere else. I can’t figure out how to do anything else. Tried hitting every button on the wrist bracelet but can’t find a way to move the tank or fire the tank. Seems like there must be something I haven’t seen that actually starts the mission.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. As the title suggests, it is a Beta, so we are still working on and improving builds. But we would like to know more about what exactly is not working as we want to improve it

reviews.review_title: It fun and good MR games
reviews.review_description:
I tried to play a game last week but was unable to start play. I think it a bug. I tried again this morning but this time pressed the play button for a longer time.The game started and I was able to play it.The game to be enjoyable as expected.
PS. The tutorial should explain how to start the game at this point, as some other players may also encounter the same problem.
